narrative:
Cols 72-C (precinct in Franklin County) has 825 registered voters, with 51.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.1%, a modest Republican lean of 4.4 percentage points.
